completed_tasks: Created multi-file architecture: index.html + styles.css + app.js
Built complete design system with 3 themes (light/dark/high-contrast)
Implemented Google OAuth and Sheets API integration
Built computation engine with audience filtering
v4 Phase 1: Restructured to 4-tab workspace (Dashboard, Budget, Expenses, Software)
v4 Phase 2 Task 1: Replaced fallback data with real NetSuite numbers ($23,230 Programs, $7,271 T&E, $133,132 Headcount, $66,751 Outside Envelope)
v4 Phase 2 Task 1: Replaced vendor contracts with REFERENCE tab data ($392,580 before → $178,957 after = $213,623 savings)
v4 Phase 2 Task 2: Added Q4'25 reference column in annual view with muted styling
v4 Phase 2 Task 3: Added forecast data in Q2-Q4 columns ($6,300/quarter committed, hatched styling, 'terminated' for Sponge)
v4 Phase 2 Task 4: Interactive budget modeling — toggle vendors, draft items (amber), '+Add' rows, recompute on toggle
v4 Phase 2 Task 5: Interactive SW contract modeling — HubSpot/Outreach get target amount inputs + cancel checkboxes, modeled savings indicator
v4 Phase 2 Task 6: Upgraded recompute() — disabled vendors subtract from forecasts, vendor budget deltas affect available
v4 Phase 2 Task 7: Dashboard uses real data — KPIs with pacing ($92,920/yr Programs, $29,083/yr T&E), structured assumptions panel
v4 Phase 2 Task 8: Expenses tab category editing verified — category dropdown, GL-driven subcategory update, recompute cascade
Grand total row shows Programs + T&E only (excludes Headcount and Outside Envelope)
Cumulative chart shows actual line + forecast line + budget pace line
Programs allocation chart shows YTD Actual + Future Plan stacked bars (from vendorMonthly)
SW forecast chart with current vs modeled trajectories
CFO Argument panel on Software tab
v5: Replaced quarterly grid with true monthly spreadsheet — 15 month columns (Q4'25 + 12 months 2026)
v5: New vendorMonthly data model — one row per vendor, one value per month, replaces vendorBudgets+commitments split
v5: Fixed unique _row IDs (sequential from 1000, not all 0)
v5: Double-click editable future month cells in vendorMonthly
v5: Toggle vendor with toast feedback ('$12,000 freed')
v5: '+ Add new' creates vendorMonthly entry (not transaction), starts name editing
v5: Sticky first 2 columns (toggle + vendor name) during horizontal scroll
v5: Q4'25 columns muted (opacity 0.5), quarter boundary separators
v5: Past months show actuals (bold), future months show plan (hatched/italic)
v5: Sponge shows em-dash for terminated future months
v5: Draft items (Docebo, Webinar) styled with amber border
v5: Month header click drills into transaction detail view with back button
v5: Removed 3-level zoom (Annual/Quarterly/Monthly) — spreadsheet IS the view
v5: recompute() uses vendorMonthly for forecast instead of commitments
v5: Dashboard cumulative chart uses vendorMonthly for forecast line
pending_tasks: Connect to live Google Sheets data (requires OAuth sign-in)
Full QA: keyboard navigation, edge cases, error states
key_decisions: Multi-file architecture (index.html + styles.css + app.js) instead of single file
Glassmorphic chrome with data-first density (Bloomberg meets Apple)
Fallback data uses exact NetSuite DETAIL tab amounts, not approximations
Vendor contracts from REFERENCE tab: 8 vendors, $213,623 total savings
Programs budget: $90K (reduced from $180K to fund Kendall retention)
Grand total in Budget tab = Programs + T&E only (matches mockup)
v5: vendorMonthly replaces vendorBudgets+commitments — single source of truth for planned amounts
v5: Monthly spreadsheet replaces quarterly grid — every cell has one value, not dual budget|actual
v5: Forecast = sum of vendorMonthly future months (not commitment * remaining months)
HubSpot ($50,340) and Outreach ($15,054) are upcoming negotiations — SW tab models target amounts
Headcount includes 'Other Marketing Payroll' entries for dept-wide salary beyond named individuals

file_manifest.index.html: HTML shell (100 lines) - CDN links, 4-tab structure, modal, drilldown, toast
file_manifest.styles.css: Design system (~692 lines) - variables, themes, sticky columns, forecast hatching, all components
file_manifest.app.js: Application logic (1801 lines) - vendorMonthly data model, monthly spreadsheet, inline editing, 4 tab renderers, charts
